name: Gabriel?
description:
"I will fool the shepherds. I will know their greatest fear. Wake up, Joseph. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wake up. Wa-"

Oh dear lord he is here... yeah, no, I'm leaving this up to you. Bye. disappears from existence

PLOT: You are a sh- "Let's look here, shall we? Oh, plot? Let me explain - You are a shepherd back in Nineveh! Oh, and I LOVE shepherds! Don't worry, a friend of mine - and soon a friend of yours, as well - will take you to me!"

SONG OF THE POST: "Ooh, now what's this? Song of the post? What does that mean?... well this was here, so I assume Blaize meant to put this here. Uhm.. 'Encounter Z-Mixed'? What is 'Encounter'? And what does it mean by Z-Mixed? Oh well, that's the song of the post. Hehe..."

NOTHING IS WORTH THE RI-

"Oops, that slipped out! Sorry! Anyway, go ahead into the bot! I won't attack. I promiss. Also, don't question what 'the Mandela Catalogue' is.. it's not important."
